title: Legacy001 TabPFN standalone or meta-signal
summary: Test TabPFN from the simple legacy-001 root as an experimental standalone expert or as one additional meta-signal.
rationale: TabPFN is a tabular foundation model and may provide a different inductive bias from RealMLP and GBDT. It should be tested as a separate root-level research branch because its preprocessing assumptions and scale limits differ from the current engineered-feature pipeline.
implementation_hint: Start from legacy-001.py, but keep the TabPFN path isolated. Prefer a standalone OOF TabPFN benchmark on an appropriate compact feature subset or a single TabPFN OOF prediction used as an additional signal. Do not replace the parent RealMLP pipeline, do not one-hot or scale specifically for TabPFN unless required by the implementation, and document any row/feature subsampling used for feasibility.
expected_effect: Expose whether a foundation-model tabular signal adds anything beyond the RealMLP root.
risk: TabPFN may be limited by dataset size, licensing constraints, runtime, or incompatible preprocessing assumptions.
